codes.title: ST Blockade Battlefront Codes

codes.metaTitle: ST Blockade Battlefront Codes - Free Cens, Points & Rewards
codes.metaDescription: Redeem the latest ST Blockade Battlefront codes for free Cens, Points, trait rerolls, and milestone rewards. Updated with verified working codes and redemption steps.
codes.whatIsDescription: Codes are promotional keys released by the developers of ST Blockade Battlefront that grant free Cens, Points, rerolls, and milestone rewards. They drop during updates, visits milestones, and special events.

whySteps.step1Description: Instantly earn Cens, Points, and rerolls without spending Robux
whySteps.step2Description: Use free rewards to unlock units, mechs, and upgrades faster
whySteps.step3Description: Keep up with active players by redeeming every working code

guide.metaDescription: Complete ST Blockade Battlefront guides covering beginner tips, base defense, units, Titans, and expert tactics for mastering the Roblox wave defense shooter.
guide.whatIsDescription: Comprehensive guides covering gameplay mechanics, base defense strategies, and unit deployment. Learn everything from first steps to advanced Titan tactics.

whySteps.step1Description: Understand wave defense, unit placement, and avoid common beginner mistakes
whySteps.step2Description: Follow proven paths to defend your base and farm efficiently
whySteps.step3Description: Develop advanced tactics for bosses, modes, and late-wave survival

whySteps.step1Description: Understand what each faction and unit is built for
whySteps.step2Description: Choose the right units and unlock order for your progression stage
whySteps.step3Description: Position units to handle waves, bosses, and crowded fights

whySteps.step1Description: Match modes to your farming, boss practice, or endgame goals

whySteps.step3Description: Target the Cens, Mastery, and skins each mode drops

quests.metaDescription: Complete ST Blockade Battlefront quest walkthroughs covering Engineer, UTC, UTSM, UTTVM, Scientist TV Man, Dark Amplifier, Head Captain, Plunger, and Energized TV quests.
quests.whatIsDescription: Quests are progression challenges in ST Blockade Battlefront that unlock units, upgrades, and exclusive rewards. Each quest has specific steps, requirements, and target outcomes.

whySteps.step1Description: Earn units and upgrades that are gated behind quest completion
whySteps.step2Description: Use proven walkthroughs to finish each quest without guesswork
whySteps.step3Description: Pick up Cens, Mastery, and limited items tied to quests

items.title: ST Blockade Battlefront Items
items.description: Item guides for Flash Drive, Keycard, and other key items, covering where to find them, how to use them, and what they unlock.
items.metaTitle: ST Blockade Battlefront Items - Flash Drive, Keycard & Key Items
items.metaDescription: Complete ST Blockade Battlefront item guides covering Flash Drive, Keycard, and other key items. Learn where to find each item, how to use it, and what it unlocks.
items.whatIsDescription: Items are collectible objects in ST Blockade Battlefront like the Flash Drive and Keycard that unlock quests, units, or restricted areas. Knowing where to find and use them unlocks hidden progression.

whySteps.step1Description: Learn exact locations and drops for items like Flash Drive and Keycard
whySteps.step2Description: Use items to open quests, units, and locked content
whySteps.step3Description: Collect items in the right order to save time and effort
